HyperParams.description: Partial sampling-parameter map. Every field may be absent.
HyperParams.title: HyperParams

MCPServerCreate.description:
Body for ``POST /v1/mcp/servers``. ``auth_token`` is the raw bearer
token typed by the user; the API endpoint encrypts it at rest before
persisting.
MCPServerCreate.title: MCPServerCreate

MCPServerPublic.description:
Read shape — never includes the auth token. ``has_auth_token`` is a
boolean hint so the frontend can show 'token configured' vs an empty
field without ever surfacing the secret.
MCPServerPublic.title: MCPServerPublic

MCPServerUpdate.description:
Partial update. Each field is optional; only present keys are
applied. Pass ``auth_token: ""`` to clear the stored token, omit it to
leave the existing token in place.
MCPServerUpdate.title: MCPServerUpdate

MCPSyncResult.description:
Returned by ``POST /v1/mcp/servers/{id}/sync``. Mirrors what gets
persisted on the row plus a friendly count for the toast.
MCPSyncResult.title: MCPSyncResult

MCPToolInfo.description:
Snapshot of one tool advertised by an MCP server, persisted in
``mcp_servers.synced_tools`` so chat completions don't pay the
round-trip on every send.
MCPToolInfo.title: MCPToolInfo

PersonaUpdate.description: Partial update — only non-``None`` fields are applied.
PersonaUpdate.title: PersonaUpdate

PinPublic.description:
Serialised pin as returned by the API.

Carries enough denormalised message context (``session_id``, an
excerpt, role) so the home dashboard can render the card without a
second request per pin.
PinPublic.title: PinPublic

RuntimeConfig.description: What the UI status bar needs to render the ambient chrome.
RuntimeConfig.title: RuntimeConfig

UserUpdate.description:
Partial profile update. All fields optional; only non-``None`` values
are applied. ``username`` goes through the same uniqueness check as
registration. ``default_persona_id`` supports explicit ``null`` to detach
— "unset" vs "set to None" is distinguished via ``model_fields_set``.
UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate

post.description: Exchange username/password for an access + refresh token.
Revoke a refresh token (idempotent — always returns 204).

patch.description:
Patch the current user's profile. Only non-``None`` fields are applied.

A username change is guarded against collision with another account.

post.description: Rotate a refresh token: revoke the old one, issue a new pair.

get.description:
Return the current model, version, and where the model name came from.

The frontend terminal footer reads this to display ``MODEL <name>``.
We prefer the live vLLM ``/v1/models`` response (source-of-truth for what's
actually loaded), and fall back to the configured env value if vLLM is
unreachable so the bar never breaks.
List the current user's MCP servers, oldest first (insertion order).

schema.title: Response List Servers V1 Mcp Servers Get

post.description:
Register a new MCP server. ``auth_token`` (if provided) is Fernet-encrypted
before persisting and never echoed back.

patch.description:
Partial update. ``auth_token`` semantics: omit to leave the existing
cipher in place; pass empty string to clear; pass any non-empty value
to replace.

get.description: List the current user's personas + any built-ins.

schema.title: Response List Personas V1 Personas Get

post.description: Create a persona owned by the current user.

delete.description: Delete one of the user's personas. Built-ins can't be removed.

get.description: Fetch one persona (owned by the user or a built-in).

patch.description: Patch a persona. Built-ins are read-only — 403 on edit.

get.description: List the user's pinned messages, ordered by ``position`` then creation.

schema.title: Response List Pins V1 Pins Get

post.description:
Pin a message. 404 if the message belongs to another user's session,
409 if already pinned.

delete.description: Unpin a message. 404 if the pin doesn't belong to the caller.

patch.description: Patch the pin's title and/or position.

get.description: List the current user's sessions, newest first.

schema.title: Response List Sessions V1 Sessions Get

delete.description: Delete a session and all its messages.

get.description: Return a session and all its messages.
Return the messages of a session, with tool results merged in.

schema.title: Response List Messages V1 Sessions  Session Id  Messages Get

post.description: Post a user message and stream the assistant response as SSE.

get.description: List every available tool with its ``enabled`` state for the current user.

schema.title: Response List Tools V1 Tools Get

put.description: Enable or disable a tool for the current user.
